---
title: "Sihan Shao"
sortby: "3"
subtitle: "Doctoral Researcher"
image: sihan.jpg
started: "2025"
toc: false
about:
  id: person-profile
  template: jolla
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:sh.shao@outlook.com
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/sihan-shao
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/sihan-shao-046b50265/
---

```{=html}
<nav aria-label="breadcrumb">
  <ol class="breadcrumb">
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../index.html">Home</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item"><a href="../../people.html">People</a></li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active">Research Staff</li>
    <li class="breadcrumb-item active" aria-current="page">{{< meta title >}}</li>
  </ol>
</nav>
```

:::{#person-profile}
:::

## Research Interests

- Computational imaging in X-ray and electron microscopy
- Tomography and ptychography
- Machine learning for microscopy
- Optimization methods for imaging

## Background

Sihan is a doctoral researcher in the ECLIPSE Lab, supervised by Prof. Philipp Pelz. His research focuses on computational imaging in X-ray and electron microscopy, particularly in tomography and ptychography.

## Education

- **2025 – present:** Ph.D. in Computational Microscopy, FAU Erlangen-Nürnberg, Germany
- **2022 – 2024:** M.Sc. in Electronics and Nanotechnology (major) & Machine Learning (minor), Aalto University, Finland
- **2018 – 2022:** B.Sc. in Opto-Electronics Information Science and Engineering, CUST, China

## Publications & Projects

- **Rim-Integrated Bluetooth Antenna for Smart Watches with Full-Metallic Structure**  
  A. Kourani, S. Shao et al. — *EuCAP 2025*  
  [code](https://github.com/sihan-shao/EuCAP2025)

- **Neural Dispersive Hologram for Computational Submillimeter-wave Imaging**  
  Master's thesis, 2024 — developed multi-wavelength wave propagation simulation using PyTorch  
  [code](https://version.aalto.fi/gitlab/shaos3/NeuralDispersiveHologram)

- **Quantized THz Diffractive Optics Design via Automatic Differentiation**  
  S. Shao, A. Tamminen, S. Pälli, S. Gamaethige, Z. Taylor — *IRMMW-THz 2024*
